description: Taiwan's first semiconductor company (1980, spun off from ITRI). World's 3rd largest specialty foundry. Processes: high voltage, BCD, SOI, discrete, logic, mixed-signal, analog, embedded memory. 12 fabs with combined capacity >400,000 wafers/month (12-inch equivalent). Also operates fabs in Singapore and China (Xiamen). Market cap ~$26.5B USD.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - CMP, probing, dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Dual-listed on TWSE and NYSE. Major specialty foundry - key Accretech client for CMP equipment, probers, and dicers. Fabs in Taiwan, Singapore, and China. IATF 16949 automotive quality certified. Specialty/legacy node focus makes it a stable equipment customer.
